final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original editorial illustration of a classical beauty in elaborate hanfu seated on a wooden pavilion in a Jiangnan water town.

Style/medium: Chinese fine-line gongbi painting fused with xieyi ink-wash expressiveness; delicate brushwork with poetic, airy atmosphere; inspired by Song-dynasty court painting aesthetics
Composition: symmetrical framing, mid-distance full-figure shot, subject centered on pavilion platform, balanced negative space above and below
Subject: elegant young woman in layered light-celadon hanfu with gold embroidery, seated gracefully, holding a round silk folding fan, turning her head to gaze into the distance; hair pinned in a classical ji bun adorned with jade hairpin and pearl ornaments; refined, understated makeup
Scene/backdrop: traditional wooden pavilion surrounded by a blooming lotus pond — pink-white lotus flowers swaying gently in the breeze, lotus leaves beaded with glistening water droplets; background features Huizhou-style architecture with white-plastered walls and dark grey roof tiles, winding bluestone-slab paths; several white egrets skimming low over the water surface
Lighting/mood: soft diffused daylight, gentle and luminous, evoking a tranquil, poetic mood; cool ambient light with warm gold accents from embroidery
Color palette: pale celadon and ink-wash grey as the dominant tones, gold embroidery as accent, pink-white lotus as secondary warmth, overall palette restrained and elegant
Materials/textures: fine silk fabric with visible embroidery thread detail, smooth jade hairpin surface, translucent water droplets on lotus leaves, weathered wood grain on pavilion planks
Avoid: modern styling, Western portrait conventions, oversaturated colors, harsh shadows, photorealistic rendering, generic anime style, watermark
